name: CrowdBulk
tagline: Bulk inference powered by the crowd's in-browser LLMs
description: Upload an Excel sheet with a prompt column; get an email when it's done. Rows are processed in batches of ~50 by active users' browsers (WebGPU LLMs), no server-side GPU.

env_vars.description: SMTP URL for sending completion emails (e.g. smtp://user:pass@smtp.example.com:587)
